title: Proclamation No. 2089, s. 1981
text:
Tanggapan ng Pangulo ng Pilipinas (OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES)

PROCLAMATION NO. 2089

RESERVING FOR PURPOSES OF THE EXPORT PROCESSING ZONE AUTHORITY CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE CITY OF ANGELES, ISLAND OF LUZON.

By virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale and settlement and reserve in favor of the Export Processing Zone Authority for the establishment of the Pampanga Export Processing Zone, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to future survey, certain parcels of land of the private domain situated in the City of Angeles, which are more particularly described as follows:

Lot 122-E-1-A Psd-03-003912

A parcel of land (Lot 122-E-1-A of the subdivision plan Psd-03-003912, being a portion of the lot 122-E-1, (LRC) Psd-204812, L. R. C. Rec. No. 124), situated in the Barrio of Pulong Maragul, City of Angeles. Bounded on the SW., along lines 1 to 23 by Manila-North Expressway (lot 122-E-2, (LRC) Psd-204812; on the NW., and N., along lines 23-24-25-26-27 by lot 73; on the N., along line 27-28 by lot 74 both of Cad. 93; on the NE., along lines 28-29-30 by lot 153 of Angeles Cadastre, and on the SE., along line 30-31 by lot 122-E-1-B; along line 31-32 by lot 122-E-1-C, along line 32-1 by lot 122-E-1-D, all of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 76 deg. 28’W., 745.77 m. from M.B.M. 27, Angeles Cadastre;

thence N. 32 deg. 5’W., 49.90 m. to point 2; thence N. 32 deg. 33’W., 49.90 m. to point 3; thence N. 32 deg. 38’W., 8.22 m. to point 4; thence N. 51 deg. 24’W., 55.00 m. to point 5; thence N. 14 deg. 37’W., 16.32 m. to point 6; thence N. 87 deg. 33’W., 30.27 m. to point 7; thence N. 6 deg. 18’E., 58.89 m. to point 8; thence N. 22 deg. 47’W., 30.78 m. to point 9; thence N. 30 deg. 12’W., 33.32 m. to point 10; thence N. 63 deg. 12’W., 38.19 m. to point 11; thence N. 29 deg. 23’W., 230.63 m. to point 12; thence N. 70 deg. 37’W., 58.92 m. to point 13; thence N. 30 deg. 21’W., 46.20 m. to point 14; thence N. 30 deg. 28’W., 49.91 m. to point 15; thence N. 30 deg. 15’W., 49.90 m. to point 16; thence N. 30 deg. 05’W., 49.90 m. to point 17; thence N. 29 deg. 53’W., 49.90 m. to point 18; thence N. 29 deg. 41’W., 49.90 m. to point 19; thence N. 29 deg. 30’W., 49.90 m. to point 20; thence N. 30 deg. 08’W., 24.03 m. to point 21; thence N. 52 deg. 55’E., 10.00 m. to point 22; thence N. 28 deg. 37’W., 300.66 m. to point 23; thence N. 12 deg. 17’E., 52.48 m. to point 24; thence N. 77 deg. 34’E., 21.81 m. to point 25; thence N. 2 deg. 08’E., 65.04 m. to point 26; thence S. 88 deg. 17’E., 641.78 m. to point 27; thence S. 81 deg. 20’E., 290.78 m. to point 28; thence S. 11 deg. 45’W., 230.90 m. to point 29; thence S. 61 deg. 31’E., 204.26 m. to point 30; thence S. 31 deg. 20’W., 455.00 m. to point 31; thence S. 31 deg. 20’W., 50.03 m. to point 32; thence S. 31 deg. 20’W., 424.57 m. to the point

of beginning; containing an area of SIX HUNDRED NINETY-NINE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED SIXTY-NINE (699,969) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: points 30-31 and 32 by P.S. cyl. conc. mons.; and the rest by Old Points; Bearings true; date of the original survey, Jan.-July 1975 and that of the subdivision survey, May 10, 1981 and was approved on May 28, 1981.

Lot 122-E-1-C Psd-03-003912

A parcel of land (Lot 122-E-1-C of the subdivision plan Psd-03-003912, being a portion of lot 122-E-1, (LRC) Psd-204812, L. R. C. Rec. No. 124), situated in the Barrio of Pulong Maragul, City of Angeles. Bounded on the NE., along line 1-2 by lot 122-E-1-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE., along line 2-3 by Provincial Road; on the SW., along line 3-4 by lot 122-E-1-D, and on the NW., along line 4-1 by lot 122-E-1-A, both of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 39 deg. 31’W., 751.53 m. from M.B.M. 27, Angeles Cadastre;

thence S. 56 deg. 37’E., 300.07 m. to point 2; thence S. 29 deg. 28’W., 50.12 m. to point 3; thence N. 56 deg. 37’W., 301.73 m. to point 4; thence N. 31 deg. 20’E., 50.03 m. to the point

of beginning; containing an area of FIFTEEN THOUSAND FORTY-SIX (15,046) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. cyl. conc. mons.; Bearings true; date of the original survey, Jan.-July 1915 and that of the subdivision survey, May 10, 1981 and was approved on May 28, 1981.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 5th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and eighty-one.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN T. VENUS, JR. Deputy Presidential Executive Assistant

Source: CDAsia
